channel.title: SevenAtSevenSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Travel industry pushes Congress to end DHS shutdown and pay federal security workers
item.description: With the busy spring break travel season looming, travel and aviation industry leaders urged Congress to end the stalemate over DHS funding before wor...

item.title: Can a digital tablet cut back a country's overuse of antibiotics?
item.description: Overprescribing antibiotics breeds antibiotic resistance. A new tool aims to lower a notably high rate of such prescriptions in Rwanda.

item.title: A Jan. 6 rioter pardoned by Trump was sentenced to life in prison for child sex abuse
item.description: Since receiving presidential pardons, dozens of former Capitol rioters have gotten into more legal trouble. In Florida, Andrew Paul Johnson was senten...

item.title: Trump fires Kristi Noem as DHS chief, names Sen. Markwayne Mullin to replace her
item.description: President Trump has fired his homeland security secretary, Kristi Noem, and said Markwayne Mullin, a senator from Oklahoma, would replace her.

item.title: They were led off course in a big race. But a fix is more complicated than prize money
item.description: Top finishers in the Atlanta half marathon are calling for U.S. track officials to ensure that Jess McClain and two other athletes aren't excluded fro...

item.title: Amazon is rolling out a redesigned Fire TV app
item.description: With the updated Fire TV app, users can browse and discover content directly from their phone, manage their watchlist on the go, and play titles on th...

item.title: Jury deliberating at sex trafficking trial of the Alexander brothers, real estateâs âA Teamâ

item.title: BYD rolls out EV batteries with 5-minute âflash charging.â But thereâs a catch.
item.description: The Chinese automaker's new Blade Battery 2.0 is capable of charging at up to 1.5 megawatts, dramatically slashing the time it takes to fill up.

item.title: Suspect in custody in Colorado in the case of 3 women found dead in Utah
item.description: A man who authorities accuse of killing a southern Utah woman, stealing her vehicle and driving it to a nearby trailhead and killing two women who wer...

item.title: Italian prosecutors confirm journalist was hacked with Paragon spyware
item.description: Italian authorities are making progress in their investigation into a wide-ranging spyware scandal in Italy involving Paragon spyware. But the mystery...

item.title: Itâs official: The Pentagon has labeled Anthropic a supply-chain risk
item.description: The Department of Defense has officially labeled Anthropic a supply-chain risk, making the AI firm the first American company with the label. Meanwhil...

item.title: The Best (and Worst) Housing Markets in America (March 2026 Update)
item.description: The housing market is split. Some real estate markets are seeing low inventory, rising prices, and fierce buyer competition. Others are seeing steep p...

item.title: X revamps Creator Subscriptions with new features, like exclusive threads and shareable cards
item.description: X is rolling out a series of new features for creators, like the ability to offer paid threads and other marketing tools.

item.title: Videos from officers show terrifying moments during Texas mass shooting that left 3 dead
